title: Blighted
description: Zombie Apocalypse X Dark Fantasy themed Minecraft RPG Modpack. Travel through a corrupted, medieval world as a Vagabond warrior.
body:
![Text Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b79997369f212692a8081d59e192f2f819f73453.png)

A terrible evil stalks the land, its darkness unchallenged. You alone must rise and end its reign.

![Page Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c524f291319cbd515ce0b6178c7931cac57c830.png)

Once, a great kingdom stood — its name now buried beneath ash and time.

Pride turned to rot when an ancient evil clawed its way from the depths, unleashing a plague that wrenched the dead from their graves.

The kingdom's stone walls cracked, its banners burned, and its people were torn apart in the streets.

Those few who survived fled into the broken wilds, their hope as brittle as the bones littering the earth.

Now, under a sky choked with ash and smoke, only the desperate claw at life in a world that has already been claimed by the dead.

![Fight for life](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4de06238e90a3202f042c60ba99a6c1d400ee964.png) ![Page Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c524f291319cbd515ce0b6178c7931cac57c830.png) ![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7a1512ae432c1be1abca7273d8678d473ed6752.png) * 🗡️**RPG Aspects:** Level up using a combination of simply skills, Epic Knights, and the ZsoltMolnarrr RPG Series modset * 🛡️**Defend:** Defend from dangerous zombies that can scale walls, climb each other, and break into undefended bases * 🗺️**Terrain:** A combination of WWOO, Antique Atlas, and Terralith create the most immersive world possible * 🐉**Bosses:** If you travel far enough, you can fight epic bosses and get unique loot * 🧭**Exploration:** Explore the incredible terrain to find epic structures, castles, and dungeons * 🌐**Multiplayer:** Multiplayer is encoraged for the best experience ![Page Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c524f291319cbd515ce0b6178c7931cac57c830.png) ![FAQ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80b97fd777d4156ead222b7fa6000cf8aab3de7a.png) * **Q:** Since the zombies can break blocks, how do I defend my base? **A:** You must use hard blocks like the various types of castle bricks from the **Castle Blocks** mod, and obsidian to defend your base. * **Q** Can I disable the gore? **A:** Yes. In the config for the mods; **Goop, Oooze, and Physics mod, you can customise and enable/disable all of the gore effects. * **Q:** Can I change the difficulty of the zombies? **A:** Yes. If you go into the config for the apocalypse mod, you can change diffrent aspects of the hordes. * **Q** Is this good with Texture Packs? **A:** Absolutely. the modpack comes with an optional preinstall of [Excalibur by Maffhew](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal), which looks incredible.
